title: Register a new account and reach the dashboard
description: Verifies a new user can register with valid details and is redirected to the authenticated dashboard.

steps.description: Fill a new full name into the full name field
Fill a unique email address into the email field
Fill a valid password of at least 6 characters into the password field
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: View dashboard summary and credits
description: Verifies an authenticated user can access the dashboard and see simulation stats, history, and remaining credits displayed.

steps.description: Wait for the dashboard to finish loading
Verify dashboard summary stats and credits remaining are displayed
Verify a simulation history list is displayed

title: View executive summary and critical findings in a report
description: Verifies that a user can open a report and see an executive summary section rendered successfully.

steps.description: Verify an executive summary section is displayed

title: Login with email and password and reach the dashboard
description: Verifies a returning user can log in with valid credentials and is redirected to the dashboard.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Start a new simulation from dashboard
description: Verifies an authenticated user can start a new simulation from the dashboard and arrive at the setup wizard.

steps.description: Click the action to create a new simulation
Verify the simulation setup wizard is displayed

title: Inspect key metrics and agent performance cards in a report
description: Verifies that a user can open a report and view key metrics along with individual agent performance cards.

steps.description: Verify key metrics and agent performance cards are displayed

title: Start a first simulation from the landing page CTA
description: Verifies a visitor can start from the landing page and reach the simulation setup flow via the primary CTA.

steps.description: Drag the pressure slider to a desired level
Click the call-to-action to run the first simulation
Verify the user lands on the simulation setup wizard

title: Open an existing simulation from dashboard history
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open a simulation from history and land on the live simulation view.

steps.description: Wait for the simulation history list to load
Click a simulation in the history list
Verify the live simulation view is displayed

title: Export the report as a PDF from the report page
description: Verifies that a user can start the PDF export flow from the report page and sees an export-in-progress or confirmation UI state.

steps.description: Verify a PDF export progress or confirmation state is visible

title: View the timeline chart of morale, stress, and output over rounds
description: Verifies that a user can view a timeline chart visualization within the report.

steps.description: Verify a timeline chart is displayed

title: Open the live demo report from the landing page CTA
description: Verifies a visitor can open the demo report from the landing page and see a complete report view rendered.

steps.description: Click the call-to-action to view the live demo report
Verify a post-simulation report is displayed

title: Redirect to login when visiting dashboard unauthenticated
description: Verifies unauthenticated users cannot access the dashboard and are sent to a login experience.

steps.description: Verify a login experience is displayed

title: View the demo report from a landing CTA-compatible route
description: Verifies that a visitor can load the demo report via a demo query parameter and see the report content rendered.

steps.description: Fill demo into the report id field

title: View AI-generated recommendations in the report
description: Verifies that a user can view recommendations content rendered in the report.

title: Explore pressure slider effects on landing page
description: Verifies a visitor can adjust the pressure level and the landing page reflects the changed simulator state.

steps.description: Drag the pressure slider to a low value
Drag the pressure slider to a high value
Verify the simulator visuals update to reflect the high pressure state

title: Logout from dashboard
description: Verifies an authenticated user can log out from the dashboard and is returned to an unauthenticated state.

steps.description: Verify the user is no longer on an authenticated dashboard view

title: Toggle password visibility during login and still sign in
description: Verifies a user can toggle password visibility during login without disrupting successful authentication.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Handle missing report id input with a validation error
description: Verifies that attempting to load a report without providing a report id shows a validation or empty-state error in the UI.

steps.description: Verify a report id validation error or empty state is visible

title: Prevent duplicate email registration
description: Verifies a user cannot register a second account with an email that is already in use and sees an error state.

steps.description: Fill a full name into the full name field
Fill a unique email address into the email field
Fill a valid password of at least 6 characters into the password field
Click the logout action from the authenticated area
Fill a full name into the full name field
Fill the previously used email address into the email field
Fill a valid password of at least 6 characters into the password field
Verify an error message is visible indicating the email cannot be used

title: Toggle theme on the dashboard after logging in
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can toggle the theme on the dashboard and the UI updates immediately.

title: Block registration with an invalid short password
description: Verifies registration prevents submitting a password that does not meet minimum length requirements and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Fill a full name into the full name field
Fill a unique email address into the email field
Fill a password shorter than 6 characters into the password field
Verify a password validation error is visible

title: Reject login with invalid credentials
description: Verifies login fails with incorrect credentials and an error state is shown without reaching the dashboard.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with an incorrect password
Verify a login error message is visible

title: Toggle theme from dashboard
description: Verifies a user can toggle between light and dark theme from the dashboard and the UI theme updates.

steps.description: Verify the application theme changes again

title: Toggle theme on the landing page
description: Verifies that a visitor can toggle between light and dark theme on the landing page and the UI updates immediately.

title: Block registration with missing required fields
description: Verifies registration requires all mandatory fields and shows validation errors when attempting to submit incomplete information.

steps.description: Fill a unique email address into the email field
Verify required-field validation errors are visible

title: Dashboard remains usable after theme toggle and navigation to setup
description: Verifies a user can toggle theme and still successfully start a new simulation without losing dashboard functionality.

steps.description: Click the action to create a new simulation
Verify the simulation setup wizard is displayed

title: Theme choice persists when navigating from landing to another route
description: Verifies that the selected theme remains applied after navigating from the landing page to another page within the app.

steps.description: Click the link to view documentation
Verify the previously selected theme remains applied

title: Navigate to docs from the landing page
description: Verifies a visitor can reach the documentation page from the landing page navigation.

steps.description: Click the navigation link to view documentation
Verify the documentation page content is displayed
